name: Tube Archivist
compose:
name: slashnode-tubearchivist
services:
  server:
    image: bbilly1/tubearchivist:v0.5.10
    container_name: tubearchivist-server
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      - elasticsearch
      - redis
    environment:
      ES_URL: http://tubearchivist-elasticsearch:9200
      REDIS_CON: redis://tubearchivist-redis:6379
      HOST_UID: '1000'
      HOST_GID: '1000'
      TA_HOST: http://${node.exports.host}:8079
      TA_USERNAME: admin
      TA_PASSWORD: ${secret.APP_PASSWORD}
      ELASTIC_PASSWORD: verysecret
      TZ: UTC
    volumes:
      - server_data-media:/youtube
      - server_data-cache:/cache
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8079:8000
  redis:
    image: redis:8.2.2-bookworm
    container_name: tubearchivist-redis
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      - elasticsearch
    volumes:
      - redis_data-redis:/data
  elasticsearch:
    image: elasticsearch:8.19.6
    container_name: tubearchivist-elasticsearch
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      ELASTIC_PASSWORD: verysecret
      ES_JAVA_OPTS: '-Xms1g -Xmx1g'
      xpack.security.enabled: 'true'
      discovery.type: single-node
      path.repo: /usr/share/elasticsearch/data/snapshot
    volumes:
      - elasticsearch_data-elasticsearch:/usr/share/elasticsearch/data
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  server_data-media:
    name: slashnode-tubearchivist_server_data-media
  server_data-cache:
    name: slashnode-tubearchivist_server_data-cache
  redis_data-redis:
    name: slashnode-tubearchivist_redis_data-redis
  elasticsearch_data-elasticsearch:
    name: slashnode-tubearchivist_elasticsearch_data-elasticsearch
